name: Cherkasy Oblast (Ukraine)
description: A blue field charged at the centre with the coat of arms of the oblast.
history: Designed by Oleksandra and Mykola Telizhenko and officially adopted on 29 January 1998 by resolution of the Cherkasy Oblast Council. Cherkasy is the heartland of the Zaporozhian Cossacks, and the flag's red-and-yellow palette echoes Cossack regimental banners.

features.symbolism: the Cossack heritage and agricultural wealth of the region
